name: NO THING
short_description: The year is 1994 and it is the future. NO THING is a minimalistic surreal action game set in totalitarian regime of future. Tells the story of an office clerk who is sent with important message to the Queen of Ice.
detailed_description:
Special Offer


NO THING soundtrack


About the Game

The year is 1994 and it is the future.


NO THING is a minimalistic surreal action game set in a totalitarian regime of future.

Tells the story of an office clerk who is sent with an important message to the Queen of Ice.

NO THING Features:

  • radical gameplay
  • migraine inducing
  • weird storyline
  • retro surrealistic full 3D graphic
  • full voiceover and speech synthesis
  • chiptune sounds
  • original cold wave music
  • simple controls
  • easy to play, very hard to master
  • platforms: Windows, Mac, Linux
  • the year is 1994 and it is the future
